name: GardenSoft
notes: GardenSoft is under contract with the City of Ashland, Oregon and other municipalities in other states to provide interactive Internet access to plant lists. In Ashland it serves as the City's official "Waterwise" plant list. Many of the plants are misidentified as  "waterwise" and "fire resistant". A fair number are noxious weeds. Use this resource with caution.
